title: Man Of War
description: A war focused mod pack with tacz and sbw
body:
Man of War is a war-focused Minecraft modpack that transforms the game into a brutal modern battlefield where strategy, firepower, and survival decide who wins the fight. Built around Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ) and Simple Block Warfare (SBW), the pack delivers intense combat, realistic weapons, and large-scale military gameplay.

Arm yourself with a massive arsenal of modern firearms, tactical gear, and customizable attachments. With TaCZ’s advanced gun mechanics and weapon customization system, every weapon can be modified for different combat roles, from close-quarters urban fighting to long-range sniper support. SBW expands the battlefield further with additional weapons, military equipment, and combat tools designed for fast-paced warfare.

The world is no longer just about survival — it is a warzone. Explore destroyed structures, build fortified bases, establish defensive bunkers, and fight over territory and resources. Logistics, preparation, and positioning can be the difference between victory and defeat.

Whether you are leading assaults, defending strongholds, or coordinating operations with your squad, Man of War delivers a military experience where teamwork and tactics matter as much as firepower. Designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer combat scenarios, the modpack turns Minecraft into a full-scale war sandbox where every battle tells a story.
